items.title: Hungarians decide whether to end 16 years of Orbán rule and elect rival
items.dek: Most polls favour Péter Magyar, who fronts a grassroots party, but PM Viktor Orbán has been in a defiant mood.
items.body: Most polls favour Péter Magyar, who fronts a grassroots party, but PM Viktor Orbán has been in a defiant mood.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Fox News analyst blames low birth rate on teens not having enough kids

items.title: The prophet and the mysterious death of Charmain Speirs
items.dek: A BBC Disclosure investigation has uncovered significant questions about what happened at the hotel where Charmain died.
items.body: A BBC Disclosure investigation has uncovered significant questions about what happened at the hotel where Charmain died.
